focus_intent: Iteration 4 done: quantum-vs-classical scope established. Only 16 of 317,750 triads (0.005%) show quantum beating classical. Max advantage +0.1854 on multi-agent triad. Partial real-QPU verification (2 of 3 pairs landed; both show real LOWER than sim — signal direction confirmed). Origin queue variance stalled pair (1,2) twice on multi-agent triad. K=8 sim shows +0.27 advantage (vs +0.19 at K=4) but noise eats it on real hardware. Refined fleet recommendation: quantum-kernel is a TIEBREAKER for cluster-similar docs, NOT primary memory recall. Iteration 5 queued: variance characterization on rank-1 algorithmic triad. Budget tracker 0.0s; operator standing authorization to reset.
